member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Telemetry.IExecutionTelemetryRecorder
member.summary: Records individual execution outcomes (typically from a decorator or middleware).

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Telemetry.ITelemetryProvider
member.summary: Supplies aggregated telemetry for adaptive control decisions.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Telemetry.RollingWindowTelemetryProvider
member.summary: Thread-safe rolling-window telemetry using time-based segments for O(1) cleanup. Uses bucketing to avoid O(n) scans on every collection.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Telemetry.TelemetrySnapshot
member.summary: Point-in-time metrics used to compute service health.
